text:
Once upon a time, in the quaint town of Whispering Pines, there lived a curious raccoon named Ruby. Ruby loved exploring every corner of Whispering Pines, from the mossy forest edges to the peaceful lake nestled among towering pines.

One bright September morning, while munching on an acorn, Ruby heard an unusual scurry. Upended a flower pot, expecting perhaps a squirrel, but instead found a tiny mole traipsing about. Intrigued, Ruby followed. The little mole wore tiny goggles attached to a plush little scarf.

"Moles have goggles?" Ruby wondered aloud.

After some observations, Ruby decided she should help. Following the little mole, she discovered a network of tunnels leading deep into the earth. Her new friend was searching for worms.

"I could help find worms," Ruby said.

So they spent days together. Ruby’s great strength was her keen sense of smell. Whenever they encountered earthworms, Ruby would gently coax them out.
